chapters.title: The Old Notebook
chapters.content: While cleaning the kitchen, Clara found her grandmother’s old recipe notebook. The pages were worn, but every dish had a story.

chapters.title: Trying Again
chapters.content: She decided to cook the famous apple pie from page twelve. The instructions were simple, but the memory behind them made it special.

chapters.title: Same Sweet Taste
chapters.content: When the pie was ready, the smell brought her back to childhood Sundays. Some recipes preserve more than flavor—they preserve time.
